name: spend-monitor
description: AWS spend monitoring - consolidated org spend with MoM/YoY/trailing analysis, threshold alerting, and Slack notifications

aws_profile.title: AWS Profile
aws_profile.description: AWS profile name with Cost Explorer access

aws_region.title: AWS Region
aws_region.description: AWS region for billing API calls

slack_channel.title: Slack Channel
slack_channel.description: Slack channel or DM ID for spend alerts (e.g., #spend-alerts or D030G78377G). Leave empty to disable.
